source_citation: 38 U.S.C. 3703(a)(1)(A); 38 CFR 36.4302; VA Lenders Handbook (Pamphlet 26-7) Ch.3 & Ch.7; Blue Water Navy Vietnam Veterans Act (Pub.L. 116-23, eff. 2020-01-01); VA Maximum Guaranty Calculation circular. Statutory guaranty bands are stable; verify against current circular.

guaranty_bands.note: > $144,000 (full entitlement): 25% of loan, NO cap post-2020 (Blue Water Navy Act; CFR 36.4302(a)(4) $60k cap is stale pre-2020 text)

irrrl_note: IRRRL (interest rate reduction refinance): VA guarantees 25% of the loan regardless of amount or remaining entitlement (38 CFR 36.4302(b)).
